description_long: This induction cooker features a rectangular body with a teal-colored base and a white cooktop surface. The cooktop is equipped with four distinct burners, each with a blue burner cap and surrounded by black metal grates. On the right side of the cooktop, there is a control panel with multiple round knobs and a vented section, all in matching blue and black tones. The front face includes a large oven door with a horizontal handle, and the entire unit stands on four pointed black legs. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with a robust and functional design suitable for urban kitchens or communal cooking spaces.
description: A teal and white induction cooker with four burners, a front oven door, and a side control panel with multiple knobs and vents.
description_view_0: The left side of the induction cooker is visible, showing the cooktop burners and the side profile of the control panel.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the oven door, handle, and the full arrangement of burners and control panel.
description_view_2: The right side of the cooker is shown, focusing on the control panel and the side of the cooktop.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the cooker, with the control panel and burners partially visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the cooktop and features four round knobs arranged in a row, with a vented section beside them. There are no visible labels, icons, or indicator lights.
